summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Digital Twin Agent installer prep phase refactor fix. Verified all 5 numbered step echoes, 'done.' markers, removal of problematic code (taskkill PythonService, takeown, icacls /reset, attrib, for loops), explicit taskkill lines, and all regression checks (UAC elevation, DPAPI, fsutil, BACKEND_URL, pairing code, installer invocation, balanced parens/quotes, file size).
passed_tests: Auth login with admin@digitaltwin.com / ChangeMe!2026
GET /api/agent/installer/info returns available=true, bundle=true
POST /api/agent/installer/download-init returns fresh DT-XXXX-XXXX pairing_code
download-init returns download_token
GET /api/agent/installer/download returns HTTP 200 application/zip
Downloaded ZIP contains install.cmd (14.3 KB)
install.cmd contains '[1/5] Stopping any existing DigitalTwinAgent Windows service ...'
install.cmd contains '[2/5] Terminating any leftover agent executables ...'
install.cmd contains '[3/5] Cleaning previous install directory (if any) ...'
install.cmd contains '[4/5] Preparing install directory %INSTALL_ROOT% ...'
install.cmd contains '[5/5] Launching installer against %BACKEND_URL% ...'
install.cmd contains 4 'echo       done.' markers (after steps 1-4)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'taskkill /F /IM PythonService' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'takeown ' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain '/reset' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'attrib -R' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'for %%P in' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'for /L %%i in' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'retry %%i/8' (correctly removed)
install.cmd contains explicit 'taskkill /F /IM agent.exe'
install.cmd contains explicit 'taskkill /F /IM DigitalTwinAgent.exe'
install.cmd contains explicit 'taskkill /F /IM uninstaller.exe'
install.cmd contains PowerShell UAC self-elevation 'Start-Process -Verb RunAs'

install.cmd contains 'fsutil dirty query' probe

install.cmd contains final installer invocation with '--no-pair --silent'
install.cmd has balanced parentheses (62 open, 62 close)
install.cmd has balanced double-quotes (92 quotes, even number)
install.cmd is under 20KB (14.3 KB, smaller than before due to removed cleanup code)
